instruction: Express the repeating decimal $r_{1}=0.\overline{27}$ as a fraction. Hint: $100r_{1}-r_{1}$ is an integer. $0.\overline{27}=$ [ANS] $/$ [ANS]. Then express the repeating decimal $r_{2}=0.4\overline{6}$ as a fraction. $0.4\overline{6}=$ [ANS] $/$ [ANS]. Note: Enter both fractions in reduced terms. That is, numerator and denominator should have no common factors.
